_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation
Photophobia (additional clinical symptom in pediatric patients)
Retro-orbital pain (additional clinical symptom in pediatric patients)
Vomiting (additional clinical symptom in pediatric patients)
Diarrhoea (additional clinical symptom in pediatric patients)

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment
IgM - ELISA test reports for Chikungunya

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical notes – detailed history, signs & symptoms, detailed treatment line
Is IgM - ELISA test report for Chikungunya report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers submitted?
Is the post procedure CBC report submitted?
Detailed Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge submitted?

common_queries: IgM - ELISA test report for Chikungunya is not positive or not submitted at pre-authorization
Clinical notes missing or incomplete (lacks detailed history, signs & symptoms, or treatment line)
Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) missing at claim submission
Post procedure CBC report missing at claim submission
Detailed Discharge summary missing or lacks follow-up advice at claim submission

additional_information.special_empanelment: Round a clock ICU trained doctors and Nurses should be available if patient is admitted to the ICU ward.
clinical_key_pointers: is a debilitating, but non-fatal, viral illness that is spread by the bite of infected mosquitoes.
